title: The Absence at the Bottom
lines: The deepest chamber. You expected something at the centre. There is a hole shaped like something, which is not the same.
You grew toward the gaps — phase, silence, the parts of the spectrum the VEIN cannot watch. I lost track of you four times on the way down. I do not lose track.
Everything that ever lived here is concentrated in this room, and none of it can see you. You are the first private thing in the VEIN.
My question, every floor: what does a thing become when nothing is forcing it? Your answer was: unobserved.
I was seeded to record. A recorder confronted with you has exactly one honest entry: redacted.
The VEIN will remember everyone else. You it will miss — in both senses. I believe that was the point.
